#T_RL=webanno.custom.SocialRelationship|Direction|InclusionRelationType|Modality|RelationType|BT_webanno.custom.CharacterMention
#Text=Plain
#Text=Sero Hanta was plain.
#Text=He knew it.
#Text=At least, he was plain visually.
#Text=He looked like a lot of other guys his age.
#Text=He didn't have cool hair like the rest of his friend group, wasn't particularly muscular or cutesy, and his only stand-out feature were his weird elbows.
#Text=And normally, he was okay with that, because he figured his fun personality made up for it.
#Text=But someone as cute and talented as Midoriya Izuku wasn't going to notice "a cool, passable personality."
#Text=Sero couldn't remember exactly when he started liking Midoriya.
#Text=Sometime around the middle of their first year, he started to feel it.
#Text=That pining ache in the chest whenever his green-haired classmate spoke to him.
#Text=There was just something about Deku.
#Text=Maybe it was his courage, or his enthusiasm, or maybe it was as simple as he was just cute and nice.
#Text=But whatever it was, it made Sero's heart flutter.
#Text=He never acted on those feelings.
#Text=Sure, he went out of his way to tell Deku new jokes, lend him a pencil in class, wake up early so he could see a cute, sleepy Midoriya stumble out of his dorm room and offer him coffee.
#Text=A confession though?
#Text=Never.
#Text=No, Deku would probably end up with Ochako, she was cute and they got along so well.
#Text=Or maybe Tsuyu, they worked well as a team.
#Text=Maybe Midoriya DID like guys.
#Text=But in that case, he'd probably pick Bakugo.
#Text=They were childhood friends after all.
#Text=Could be Todoroki, though.
#Text=So mysterious and attractive.
#Text=But it would never be him, Sero knew, and he made himself okay with that.
#Text=Because as long as he could be around Deku, and Deku was happy?
#Text=He was happy.
#Text=But, weirdly enough, he started to get closer to Midoriya.
#Text=Deku invited him out shopping, asked if he needed help studying, and even took care of him once when he caught a nasty cold.
#Text=He was just so sweet, the way his brilliant green eyes brightened when he smiled, how bouncy he got when talking about heroes, the way those gorgeous pink lips formed around his name.
#Text="Hanta," Sero had said once, cutting off Midoriya's spiel.
#Text="You can call me Hanta now, Midoriya."
#Text=Deku had blushed that day.
#Text="You can call me Izuku, Ser- I mean, Hanta."
#Text=Izuku.
#Text=Izuku.
#Text=Izuku.
#Text=Izuku.
#Text=Izuku.
#Text=Izuku.
#Text=The name felt beautiful on his lips.
#Text=He had allowed him to use his given name... did that mean...?
#Text=Was there a chance, no matter how small, that Deku might like him back?
#Text=Was there a chance that Sero could be with the boy he loved with all his heart?
#Text=A chance that he could be happy and make Midoriya- no, Izuku- happy as well?
#Text=Several days later, he bit the bullet and put his plan into action.
#Text=Well... if you could call it a plan.
#Text=He had mostly just gotten Izuku flowers and a gift, and spent almost an hour rehearsing what he was going to say in the mirror.
#Text=He felt underprepared.
#Text=He felt ridiculous.
#Text=There was no way this would end well.
#Text=He may as well just STOP hanging out in front of Izuku's room like a creep, and just shuffle back to his dorm room to mope and accept he'd be alone for-
#Text="Hey!
#Text="Hantaaa~!
#Text="Where you waiting for me?
#Text="Oh?
#Text=Izuku asked, going wide-eyed.
#Text="Yea, I was going to ask... if you maybe wanted to go on a date.
#Text="Yea."
#Text=He paused and held up the shopping bag in his hands.
#Text="I knew you wanted a copy of All Might Fifty-States Savior 3.
